docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,765.58 FILED BY CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO BUREAU OF DELINQUENT REVENUE AS TO DEFENDANT ZAMORA,JOE S. JR. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-28-1994 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 03
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT ZAMORA,JOE S. JR.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO BUREAU OF DELINQUENT REVENUE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ZAMORA,JOE S. JR. $1,765.58 PRINCIPAL, $60.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,825.58 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $958.94 ACCRUED INTEREST AS TO DEFENDANT ZAMORA,JOE S. JR.
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN MATEO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT ZAMORA,JOE S. JR.
WRIT RETURNED WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN MATEO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, UNSATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT ZAMORA,JOE S. JR.
WRIT ISSUED TO SAN MATEO COUNTY RETURNED UNSATISFIED AS TO ZAMORA, JOE S. JR.
